Class LiveMeasurementSubscription

java.lang.Object
com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.subscription.LiveMeasurementSubscription
public class LiveMeasurementSubscription extends Object
Subscription for receiving real-time measurement data from the Tibber API.

This class handles the WebSocket connection to the Tibber API and processes the subscription data. For more information about the Tibber API, see: Tibber API Documentation

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LiveMeasurementSubscription(String accessToken, String homeId, SubscriptionHandler handler)
    Creates a new live measurement subscription for the specified home.
    LiveMeasurementSubscription(String accessToken, String homeId, SubscriptionHandler handler, okhttp3.OkHttpClient httpClient)
    Creates a new live measurement subscription with a custom HTTP client.

  • Constructor Details

    • LiveMeasurementSubscription

      public LiveMeasurementSubscription(String accessToken, String homeId, SubscriptionHandler handler)
      Creates a new live measurement subscription for the specified home.
      Parameters:
      accessToken - the Tibber API access token
      homeId - the ID of the home to subscribe to
      handler - the handler for subscription events

    • LiveMeasurementSubscription

      public LiveMeasurementSubscription(String accessToken, String homeId, SubscriptionHandler handler, okhttp3.OkHttpClient httpClient)
      Creates a new live measurement subscription with a custom HTTP client.
      Parameters:
      accessToken - the Tibber API access token
      homeId - the ID of the home to subscribe to
      handler - the handler for subscription events
      httpClient - the HTTP client to use for the WebSocket connection

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start()
      Starts the subscription to real-time measurement data.

      This method establishes a WebSocket connection to the Tibber API and initiates the subscription. The handler will be notified of connection status changes and incoming measurement data.

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Stops the subscription to real-time measurement data.

      This method closes the WebSocket connection and terminates the subscription.

    • isConnected

      public boolean isConnected()
      Returns whether the subscription is currently connected.
      Returns:
      true if connected, false otherwise
